targetTranslation: when (referring to future events, introducing وَقَعَتِ)
ayahEnglish: When the Occurrence occurs,
When the Occurrence occurs,
There is, at its occurrence, no denial.
There is, at its occurrence, no denial.
It will bring down [some] and raise up [others].

targetTranslation: a feminine one who definitely lifts up/raises (contrasts with خَافِضَةٌ)
ayahEnglish: It will bring down [some] and raise up [others].

targetTranslation: when (introduces what will happen when the earth is shaken)
ayahEnglish: When the earth is shaken with convulsion
When the earth is shaken with convulsion
When the earth is shaken with convulsion

targetTranslation: completely crushed to powder (describing how الْجِبَالُ/the mountains were affected)
ayahEnglish: And the mountains are broken down, crumbling

targetTranslation: dust particles (being acted upon by مُّنۢبَثًّا - scattered)
ayahEnglish: And become dust dispersing,
And become dust dispersing,

targetTranslation: pairs/spouses (as the object being acted upon)
ayahEnglish: And you become [of] three kinds:
And you become [of] three kinds:
Then the companions of the right - what are the companions of the right?

targetTranslation: companions (subject of الميمنة/those of the right hand)
ayahEnglish: Then the companions of the right - what are the companions of the right?
And the companions of the left - what are companions of the left?

targetTranslation: companions (as the doers of an action)
ayahEnglish: And the companions of the left - what are companions of the left?
Those are the ones brought near [to Allāh]
In the Gardens of Pleasure,

targetTranslation: a group (subject of this part of the ayah)
ayahEnglish: A [large] company of the former peoples
On thrones woven [with ornament],

targetTranslation: woven tightly (feminine, describing سُرُرٍ in the genitive case)
ayahEnglish: On thrones woven [with ornament],

targetTranslation: those who are reclining comfortably (on عَلَيْهَا)
ayahEnglish: Reclining on them, facing each other.

targetTranslation: those facing each other (describes متكئين/reclining ones)
ayahEnglish: Reclining on them, facing each other.

targetTranslation: he circles/is circling around (subject doing action to عَلَيْهِمْ)
ayahEnglish: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal.
There will circulate among them young boys made eternal.
There will circulate among them young boys made eternal.
With vessels, pitchers and a cup [of wine] from a flowing spring -

targetTranslation: they are being affected by intense pain (from drinking wine)
ayahEnglish: No headache will they have therefrom, nor will they be intoxicated -

targetTranslation: they become exhausted (referring to the people of Paradise)
ayahEnglish: No headache will they have therefrom, nor will they be intoxicated -
And fruit of what they select

targetTranslation: a bird (meat of birds mentioned in وَلَحْمِ)
ayahEnglish: And the meat of fowl, from whatever they desire.

targetTranslation: they desire for themselves (what they want from the food mentioned)
ayahEnglish: And the meat of fowl, from whatever they desire.
And [for them are] fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes,
As reward for what they used to do.
As reward for what they used to do.

targetTranslation: they do/work (as a reward for what they used to)
ayahEnglish: As reward for what they used to do.

ayahArabic: لَا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا وَلَا تَأْثِيمًا
ayahEnglish: They will not hear therein ill speech or commission of sin -

targetTranslation: useless talk (object of يَسْمَعُونَ - they hear)
ayahArabic: لَا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا وَلَا تَأْثِيمًا
ayahEnglish: They will not hear therein ill speech or commission of sin -

ayahArabic: لَا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا وَلَا تَأْثِيمًا
ayahEnglish: They will not hear therein ill speech or commission of sin -
Only a saying [of] peace, peace.
Only a saying [of] peace, peace.
Only a saying [of] peace, peace.
The companions of the right - what are the companions of the right?
The companions of the right - what are the companions of the right?

targetTranslation: a lote tree (describing what is in جَنَّاتِ)
ayahEnglish: [They will be] among lote trees with thorns removed.
[They will be] among lote trees with thorns removed.

targetTranslation: arranged in layers, piled up (describing طَلْحٍ)
ayahEnglish: And [banana] trees layered [with fruit].
And shade extended.
And water poured out

targetTranslation: abundant/many (feminine, describing and matching the case of فٰكِهَةٍ - fruits)
ayahEnglish: And fruit, abundant [and varied],

targetTranslation: endless (describing fruits in paradise that are never cut off)
ayahEnglish: Neither limited [to season] nor forbidden,

targetTranslation: prevented (describing a feminine thing that belongs to something else)
ayahEnglish: Neither limited [to season] nor forbidden,

targetTranslation: lifted up (feminine, describing وَفُرُشٍ/cushions, in genitive case)
ayahEnglish: And [upon] beds raised high.
Indeed, We have produced them [i.e., the women of Paradise] in a [new] creation

targetTranslation: a creating/bringing into being (as the object being described)
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We have produced them [i.e., the women of Paradise] in a [new] creation
And made them virgins,

targetTranslation: loving wives (describing the women of Paradise)
ayahEnglish: Devoted [to their husbands] and of equal age,
Devoted [to their husbands] and of equal age,
A company of the former peoples

targetTranslation: what (questioning about أَصْحٰبُ ٱلشِّمَالِ - the companions of the left)
ayahEnglish: And the companions of the left - what are the companions of the left?
And the companions of the left - what are the companions of the left?
[They will be] in scorching fire and scalding water
And a shade of black smoke,

targetTranslation: cold (describing the shade in لَّا ظِلٍّ بَارِدٍ - no cool shade)
ayahEnglish: Neither cool nor beneficial.
Neither cool nor beneficial.

targetTranslation: they were (describing their state before ذٰلِكَ)
ayahEnglish: Indeed they were, before that, indulging in affluence,
Indeed they were, before that, indulging in affluence,
Indeed they were, before that, indulging in affluence,

targetTranslation: those who are given luxuries (object of كَانُوا)
ayahEnglish: Indeed they were, before that, indulging in affluence,

targetTranslation: they persist strongly (referring to the disbelievers mentioned in وَكَانُوا۟)
ayahEnglish: And they used to persist in the great violation,

ayahArabic: وَكَانُوا۟ يَقُولُونَ أَئِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they used to say, "When we die and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected?

targetTranslation: is it when? (questioning what يَقُولُونَ/they say)
ayahArabic: وَكَانُوا۟ يَقُولُونَ أَئِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they used to say, "When we die and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected?

ayahArabic: وَكَانُوا۟ يَقُولُونَ أَئِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they used to say, "When we die and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected?

ayahArabic: وَكَانُوا۟ يَقُولُونَ أَئِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they used to say, "When we die and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected?

targetTranslation: is it really that we? (questioning what يَقُولُونَ/they say)
ayahArabic: وَكَانُوا۟ يَقُولُونَ أَئِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
ayahEnglish: And they used to say, "When we die and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected?
And our forefathers [as well]?"
Say, [O Muḥammad], "Indeed, the former and later peoples

targetTranslation: appointed time (of يَوْمٍ مَّعْلُومٍ - a known day)
ayahEnglish: Are to be gathered together for the appointment of a known Day."

targetTranslation: a day/time period (specific time of مَّعْلُومٍ)
ayahEnglish: Are to be gathered together for the appointment of a known Day."
Are to be gathered together for the appointment of a known Day."
Then indeed you, O those astray [who are] deniers,
Will be eating from trees of zaqqūm
Will be eating from trees of zaqqūm
And will drink as the drinking of thirsty camels.

targetTranslation: their hospitality (referring to the disbelievers mentioned in the context)
ayahEnglish: That is their accommodation on the Day of Recompense.
That is their accommodation on the Day of Recompense.

targetTranslation: we (subject of خَلَقْنٰكُمْ - we created you)
ayahEnglish: We have created you, so why do you not believe?
We have created you, so why do you not believe?
We have created you, so why do you not believe?

targetTranslation: then have you all seen? (connected to مَّا تُمْنُونَ - what you emit)
ayahEnglish: Have you seen that which you emit?
Have you seen that which you emit?
Have you seen that which you emit?

targetTranslation: is it you all? (subject of تَخْلُقُونَ)
ayahEnglish: Is it you who creates it, or are We the Creator?
Is it you who creates it, or are We the Creator?
Is it you who creates it, or are We the Creator?

ayahArabic: نَحْنُ قَدَّرْنَا بَيْنَكُمُ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ
ayahEnglish: We have decreed death among you, and We are not to be outdone

ayahArabic: نَحْنُ قَدَّرْنَا بَيْنَكُمُ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ
ayahEnglish: We have decreed death among you, and We are not to be outdone

ayahArabic: نَحْنُ قَدَّرْنَا بَيْنَكُمُ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ
ayahEnglish: We have decreed death among you, and We are not to be outdone

ayahArabic: نَحْنُ قَدَّرْنَا بَيْنَكُمُ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ
ayahEnglish: We have decreed death among you, and We are not to be outdone

ayahArabic: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ أَمْثٰلَكُمْ وَنُنشِئَكُمْ فِى مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: In that We will change your likenesses and produce you in that [form] which you do not know.

targetTranslation: your likes/equals (referring to those who will replace you)
ayahArabic: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ أَمْثٰلَكُمْ وَنُنشِئَكُمْ فِى مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: In that We will change your likenesses and produce you in that [form] which you do not know.

ayahArabic: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ أَمْثٰلَكُمْ وَنُنشِئَكُمْ فِى مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: In that We will change your likenesses and produce you in that [form] which you do not know.

ayahArabic: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ أَمْثٰلَكُمْ وَنُنشِئَكُمْ فِى مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: In that We will change your likenesses and produce you in that [form] which you do not know.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْتُمُ ٱلنَّشْأَةَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ فَلَوْلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And you have already known the first creation, so will you not remember?

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْتُمُ ٱلنَّشْأَةَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ فَلَوْلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And you have already known the first creation, so will you not remember?

targetTranslation: so have you (all) seen? (asking about مَّا تَحْرُثُونَ - what you sow)
ayahEnglish: And have you seen that [seed] which you sow?
And have you seen that [seed] which you sow?
And have you seen that [seed] which you sow?
Is it you who makes it grow, or are We the grower?
Is it you who makes it grow, or are We the grower?
Is it you who makes it grow, or are We the grower?

targetTranslation: we wish/want (subject of لَجَعَلْنٰهُ - we would make it)
ayahArabic: لَوْ نَشَآءُ لَجَعَلْنٰهُ حُطٰمًا فَظَلْتُمْ تَفَكَّهُونَ
ayahEnglish: If We willed, We could make it [dry] debris, and you would remain in wonder,

ayahArabic: لَوْ نَشَآءُ لَجَعَلْنٰهُ حُطٰمًا فَظَلْتُمْ تَفَكَّهُونَ
ayahEnglish: If We willed, We could make it [dry] debris, and you would remain in wonder,

ayahArabic: لَوْ نَشَآءُ لَجَعَلْنٰهُ حُطٰمًا فَظَلْتُمْ تَفَكَّهُونَ
ayahEnglish: If We willed, We could make it [dry] debris, and you would remain in wonder,
Rather, we have been deprived."

targetTranslation: they are prevented (from getting their harvest, referring to نَحْنُ)
ayahEnglish: Rather, we have been deprived."

targetTranslation: so have you all seen/considered? (about الْمَآءَ - the water)
ayahEnglish: And have you seen the water that you drink?
And have you seen the water that you drink?
And have you seen the water that you drink?

targetTranslation: is it you all? (who brought down مِنَ ٱلْمُزْنِ)
ayahArabic: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنزَلْتُمُوهُ مِنَ ٱلْمُزْنِ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنزِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Is it you who brought it down from the clouds, or is it We who bring it down?

targetTranslation: you (all) sent it down (object of أَنتُمْ)
ayahArabic: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنزَلْتُمُوهُ مِنَ ٱلْمُزْنِ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنزِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Is it you who brought it down from the clouds, or is it We who bring it down?

ayahArabic: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنزَلْتُمُوهُ مِنَ ٱلْمُزْنِ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنزِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Is it you who brought it down from the clouds, or is it We who bring it down?

ayahArabic: لَوْ نَشَآءُ جَعَلْنٰهُ أُجَاجًا فَلَوْلَا تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: If We willed, We could make it bitter, so why are you not grateful?

targetTranslation: we made it (object of نَشَآءُ - we will)
ayahArabic: لَوْ نَشَآءُ جَعَلْنٰهُ أُجَاجًا فَلَوْلَا تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: If We willed, We could make it bitter, so why are you not grateful?

targetTranslation: intensely bitter and salty (describing what the water was made into)
ayahArabic: لَوْ نَشَآءُ جَعَلْنٰهُ أُجَاجًا فَلَوْلَا تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: If We willed, We could make it bitter, so why are you not grateful?

ayahArabic: لَوْ نَشَآءُ جَعَلْنٰهُ أُجَاجًا فَلَوْلَا تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: If We willed, We could make it bitter, so why are you not grateful?

targetTranslation: have you all seen? (the النَّارَ fire)
ayahEnglish: And have you seen the fire that you ignite?
And have you seen the fire that you ignite?
And have you seen the fire that you ignite?

targetTranslation: is it you all? (questioning multiple people)
ayahArabic: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنشَأْتُمْ شَجَرَتَهَآ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنشِـُٔونَ
ayahEnglish: Is it you who produced its tree, or are We the producer?

ayahArabic: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنشَأْتُمْ شَجَرَتَهَآ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنشِـُٔونَ
ayahEnglish: Is it you who produced its tree, or are We the producer?

targetTranslation: her tree (object of أَنشَأْتُمْ - you produced)
ayahArabic: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنشَأْتُمْ شَجَرَتَهَآ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنشِـُٔونَ
ayahEnglish: Is it you who produced its tree, or are We the producer?

ayahArabic: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنشَأْتُمْ شَجَرَتَهَآ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنشِـُٔونَ
ayahEnglish: Is it you who produced its tree, or are We the producer?
We have made it a reminder and provision for the travelers,
We have made it a reminder and provision for the travelers,

targetTranslation: a reminder (object of جَعَلْنٰهَا - We made it)
ayahEnglish: We have made it a reminder and provision for the travelers,
So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.
Then I swear by the setting of the stars,

targetTranslation: you (all) know (if you knew the greatness of this oath)
ayahEnglish: And indeed, it is an oath - if you could know - [most] great.
And indeed, it is an oath - if you could know - [most] great.
Indeed, it is a noble Qur’ān.
In a Register well-protected;.
In a Register well-protected;.
None touch it except the purified [i.e., the angels].
[It is] a revelation from the Lord of the worlds.
[It is] a revelation from the Lord of the worlds.

targetTranslation: is it then with this (Quran)? (connected to مُّدْهِنُونَ)
ayahEnglish: Then is it to this statement that you are indifferent
Then is it to this statement that you are indifferent
Then is it to this statement that you are indifferent
And make [the thanks for] your provision that you deny [the Provider]?
And make [the thanks for] your provision that you deny [the Provider]?
Then why, when it [i.e., the soul at death] reaches the throat

targetTranslation: she reached (subject reaching الْحُلْقُومَ - the throat)
ayahEnglish: Then why, when it [i.e., the soul at death] reaches the throat

targetTranslation: at that time (when تَنظُرُونَ/you are looking)
ayahEnglish: And you are at that time looking on -

targetTranslation: you (all) are looking (while حِينَئِذٍ/at that time)
ayahEnglish: And you are at that time looking on -

ayahArabic: وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنكُمْ وَلٰكِن لَّا تُبْصِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We [i.e., Our angels] are nearer to him than you, but you do not see -

ayahArabic: وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنكُمْ وَلٰكِن لَّا تُبْصِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We [i.e., Our angels] are nearer to him than you, but you do not see -
Then why do you not, if you are not to be recompensed,
Then why do you not, if you are not to be recompensed,

targetTranslation: those who are indebted/will be brought to account
ayahEnglish: Then why do you not, if you are not to be recompensed,
Bring it back, if you should be truthful?
Bring it back, if you should be truthful?
Bring it back, if you should be truthful?
And if he [i.e., the deceased] was of those brought near [to Allāh],
Then [for him is] rest and bounty and a garden of pleasure.

ayahArabic: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنْ أَصْحٰبِ ٱلْيَمِينِ
ayahEnglish: And if he was of the companions of the right,

ayahArabic: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنْ أَصْحٰبِ ٱلْيَمِينِ
ayahEnglish: And if he was of the companions of the right,
Then [the angels will say], "Peace for you; [you are] from the companions of the right."

targetTranslation: he was (of مِنَ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ - from the deniers)
ayahArabic: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
ayahEnglish: But if he was of the deniers [who were] astray,

targetTranslation: boiling water (possessed by something mentioned before)
ayahEnglish: Then [for him is] accommodation of scalding water
And burning in Hellfire.
Indeed, this is the true certainty,
So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.
